title: neanotis rheedei
intro: Neanotis rheedei, also known as Rheede's beardtongue, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, which is a type of parasitic plant. Traditionally, Neanotis rheedei has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neanotis rheedei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
